caption: A man wearing a dark green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. His t-shirt features white text that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT". He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned against a background featuring several framed photographs on a wall and a white mannequin dressed in white clothing. To his left, a logo is visible on screen that reads "BOOST FLY TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a skeptical, tight-lipped look with raised eyebrows to a wide, open-mouthed smile. Throughout the scene, he remains seated and facing toward the right of the frame, while the background and equipment stay stationary.
